description_long: This is a classic black grand piano with a high-gloss finish, featuring a full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys. The piano has a curved right side and a straight left edge, typical of grand pianos, and stands on three sturdy, tapered legs with brass casters for mobility. A matching black, tufted piano bench with four legs is positioned in front of the keyboard. The lid of the piano is fully closed, giving the instrument a sleek, monolithic appearance. No visible brand or logo markings are present on the exterior surfaces. The pedals are visible beneath the keyboard, and the overall design is elegant and suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A glossy black grand piano with a matching tufted bench, full keyboard, and closed lid, standing on brass-capped legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three pedals, and the matching bench directly in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's curved body, closed lid, and the bench positioned to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, curved back of the piano and the closed lid, with no keyboard or pedals visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the straight edge of the piano, closed lid, and the bench to the right.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard 88-key layout with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys visible.
